content.description:
We are seeking a hands-on, detail-oriented Marketing Operations Manager to own and
optimize our marketing technology stack, data flow, and reporting. This person will be the bridge
between marketing, sales, and leadership, ensuring that Salesforce, HubSpot, and related tools
are seamlessly connected and delivering actionable insights.
The ideal candidate has deep experience managing CRM and marketing automation platforms,
thrives in data-driven environments, and can translate complex reporting into clear
recommendations that drive growth.

Key Responsibilities
Systems & Platform Management
● Own day-to-day administration of Salesforce and HubSpot, ensuring data integrity,
accurate tracking, and smooth integrations.
● Manage lead lifecycle, including routing, scoring, nurturing, and MQL/SQL handoff
processes.
● Optimize and troubleshoot workflows, automation, and campaigns.
Data & Reporting
● Build and maintain dashboards and reports across Salesforce, HubSpot, and BI tools.
● Track and analyze marketing funnel metrics (Lead → MQL → SQL → Opportunity →
Closed/Won).
● Provide actionable insights on campaign performance, pipeline contribution, and ROI.
● Partner with Finance and Sales Ops on forecasting, attribution, and revenue analytics.
Process & Enablement
● Define and document lead management processes, ensuring alignment with sales.
● Conduct regular audits to ensure consistent data quality
● Train marketing and sales teams on tool usage, best practices, and new features.
● Partner with campaign and demand gen teams to design experiments and measure
impact.

Qualifications
● 5+ years of experience in marketing operations or revenue operations.
● Hands-on expertise with Salesforce CRM and HubSpot Marketing Hub.
● Strong analytical skills, with proven ability to design dashboards and extract insights.
● Experience with marketing attribution models and pipeline reporting.
● Familiarity with data visualization (Tableau, Power BI, Looker) a plus.
● Process-oriented mindset with excellent communication skills.
● Ability to balance strategic thinking with tactical execution.

data.text: Senior Product Marketing Manager, Data & AI Platform

content.description:
We are seeking an experienced Product Marketing Manager to drive marketing strategy and
content creation for our data and AI platform solutions. This role requires a unique blend of
product marketing expertise, technical data management knowledge, and content creation skills
to support our sales organization across all stages as well as campaign and web assets through
the full customer journey and marketing funnel.

Key Responsibilities:
● Go-to-Market Strategy & Sales Enablement
● Develop and execute comprehensive go-to-market strategies for Incorta’s platform and
the multiple solutions within the platform.
● Create sales plays and supporting materials that align with different customer segments
and use cases
● Build content that supports prospects through every stage of the sales funnel, from
awareness to conversion
● Collaborate with Sales to understand field needs and optimize messaging
effectiveness

Content Creation & Management:
● Experience producing high-quality technical content including whitepapers, case
studies, solution briefs, and competitive battle cards
● Experience in develop website content, landing pages, and digital assets that drive
engagement and conversion
● Create demo scripts, pitch decks, and technical documentation for sales teams for
technical sales and value sales methodologies
● Manage content calendar and ensure consistent messaging across all marketing
channels

Technical Product Marketing:
● Translate complex technical data platform capabilities into compelling customer value
propositions
● Develop positioning and messaging for data management, analytics, agents, AI and
integration solutions
● Create technical content that resonates with both business and technical decision
makers
● Support product launches and feature announcements with appropriate marketing
materials

Market Intelligence & Competitive Analysis:
● Conduct market research and competitive analysis for Incorta’s main competitors for
sales
● Monitor industry trends, customer feedback, and competitive movements
● Provide market insights to inform product roadmap and marketing strategy decisions

content.description:
Incorta is a next-generation data analytics and business intelligence platform that excels at rapidly delivering business value from transactional data, this is the first real breakthrough in data analytics in 20 years. We provide an integrated end-to-end data experience, from data acquisition and enrichment to visualizing and sharing results. Our platform cuts project implementation time from months to weeks provides revolutionary query speed and maintains a unified, single source of truth for multiple workloads including business intelligence, analytics, and machine learning. Fully 90% of companies that try Incorta become customers, and over 98% of our customers are still with us. Our cloud-based service widens our reach into businesses of all sizes. There is simply no other analytics solution that is as cost-effective, agile, and impactful.

Incorta seeks a Project Manager to manage the active implementation work for our customers.

content.description:
Incorta is a next-generation data analytics and business intelligence platform that excels at rapidly delivering business value from transactional data, this is the first real breakthrough in data analytics in 20 years. We provide an integrated end-to-end data experience, from data acquisition and enrichment to visualizing and sharing results. Our platform cuts project implementation time from months to weeks provides revolutionary query speed and maintains a unified, single source of truth for multiple workloads including business intelligence, analytics, and machine learning. Fully 90% of companies that try Incorta become customers, and over 98% of our customers are still with us. Our cloud-based service widens our reach into businesses of all sizes. There is simply no other analytics solution that is as cost-effective, agile, and impactful.

As a Senior GenAI Developer at Incorta, you'll lead the creation of cutting-edge generative AI solutions leveraging Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Large Language Models (LLMs). You will play a key role in developing agentic solutions that empower our customers by enhancing decision-making processes and optimizing their analytics workflows.

lists.content:
• Data Analysis & Modeling: Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and insights.
  • Machine Learning & AI: Develop and deploy predictive models, recommendation systems, and AI-driven solutions.
  • Architected, developed, and deployed GenAI solutions integrated with RAG and LLM frameworks.
  • Design and engineer sophisticated prompts and fine-tune LLMs to achieve optimal performance.
  • Business Impact: Work closely with product, marketing, and engineering teams to provide data-driven solutions.
  • Data Visualization: Communicate findings effectively using dashboards and visual tools.
  • Optimization & Automation: Enhance existing models and automate data workflows for efficiency.
  • Collaboration: Partner with data engineers and business stakeholders to improve data quality and strategy.

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field.
  • 5+ years of experience in data science, machine learning, or a related field.
  • Strong programming skills in Python, R, or SQL.
  • Experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, or PyTorch.
  • Proven ability to build and deploy AI/ML solutions at scale.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to clearly articulate complex technical concepts.

• This position requires up to 90% travel throughout the year, both domestically and potentially internationally.
  • Flexibility in schedule and location is essential, as the role may involve frequent visits to Customer sites, conferences, or team collaboration sessions.
  • Must be comfortable working in dynamic environments and adapting quickly to changing business needs and priorities.

content.description: As an Outbound Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for identifying and qualifying leads through proactive outreach, researching target accounts, and collaborating closely with our Enterprise Account Executives to drive revenue growth. This role is ideal for someone with a strong ability to generate leads, navigate enterprise organizations, and create new sales opportunities.
content.descriptionHtml: As an Outbound Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for identifying and qualifying leads through proactive outreach, researching target accounts, and collaborating closely with our Enterprise Account Executives to drive revenue growth. This role is ideal for someone with a strong ability to generate leads, navigate enterprise organizations, and create new sales opportunities.

lists.content:
• Partner with Enterprise Account Executives to strategically identify and qualify prospects within your assigned territory.
  • Conduct thorough research on target accounts, identify key decision-makers, and generate interest in our solutions.
  • Develop and execute a proactive lead generation plan to source new opportunities and nurture existing ones.
  • Engage potential customers through outbound calls, emails, and social outreach to qualify leads and set up meetings for Account Executives.
  • Maintain a deep understanding of our product offerings and align them with potential customer needs.
  • Identify innovative outbound sales campaigns and collaborate with Marketing and Sales teams to drive initiatives.
  • Update and manage prospect interactions in Salesforce and Outreach to ensure accurate lead tracking and efficient follow-ups.
  • Provide feedback to leadership for continuous process improvements.
  • Support corporate and regional marketing events through prospecting efforts and event staffing.

• 1+ years of experience in sales, lead generation, or business development within enterprise software.
  • A results-driven "hunter" mentality with the ability to work independently.
  • Strong understanding of sales processes, objection handling, and prospecting techniques.
  • Ability to effectively communicate with C-level executives and decision-makers.
  • Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.
  • High energy, tenacity, and a self-starter mindset.
  • Excellent time and territory management skills.
  • Experience with Salesforce, Outreach, or similar CRM and sales automation tools is a plus.
  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience preferred.
